gates.label: AWS Secrets Manager shell exists
gates.error: Command failed: aws secretsmanager describe-secret --secret-id gtcx/markets-os/staging/api-keys --region af-south-1 --output json 2>/dev/null

gates.label: AWS SM secret has required keys populated
gates.error: Command failed: aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id gtcx/markets-os/staging/api-keys --region af-south-1 --output json 2>/dev/null

gates.label: ESO SecretStore exists in markets-os-staging
gates.error: Command failed: kubectl get secretstore markets-os-aws-secrets -n markets-os-staging -o json 2>/dev/null

gates.label: ESO ExternalSecret exists in markets-os-staging
gates.error: Command failed: kubectl get externalsecret markets-os-secrets -n markets-os-staging -o json 2>/dev/null

gates.label: Synthesized K8s secret markets-os-secrets exists
gates.error: Command failed: kubectl get secret markets-os-secrets -n markets-os-staging -o json 2>/dev/null
